# Clarum Peptides

> Batch-tested research peptides with full Certificates of Analysis. Every batch independently verified by ISO-accredited labs for identity, purity, quantitative assay, heavy metals, and microbial counts.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Clarum's batch-testing approach and featured research peptides.
- [Shop](/shop): Full catalog of research peptides available for purchase.
- [COA Library](/coa-library): Public library of Certificates of Analysis for every batch.
- [About](/about): How Clarum tests peptides and why batch verification matters.
- [FAQ](/faq): Answers about research peptides, COAs, shipping, storage, and RUO compliance.
- [Contact](/contact): Support, COA, and bulk research inquiries.

## Optional

- [Shipping Policy](/shipping-policy)
- [Refund Policy](/refund-policy)
